title: Effective Software Development: 7 Ways To Get More From ChatGPT & Copilot
summary: Fears that artificial intelligence will take our jobs are overblown. The likelier scenario is tools like ChatGPT will simply increase our output. A recent MIT study points to this, showing how when white-collar workers had access to an assistive chatbot, it took them 40% less time to complete a task, while the quality of their […] Artykuł Effective Software Development: 7 Ways To Get More From ChatGPT & Copilot pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
